name: claimgpt-marketing-video
description: Playwright b-roll capture for the ClaimGPT marketing video

scripts.convert: mkdir -p raw/broll_mp4 && for f in raw/broll/*.webm; do ffmpeg -y -loglevel error -i "$f" -c:v libx264 -preset slow -crf 18 -pix_fmt yuv420p -r 60 -an "raw/broll_mp4/$(basename ${f%.webm}.mp4)"; done && echo "✓ MP4 clips in raw/broll_mp4/"
scripts.thumbs: mkdir -p raw/thumbs && for f in raw/broll_mp4/*.mp4; do ffmpeg -y -loglevel error -ss 3 -i "$f" -frames:v 1 -q:v 2 "raw/thumbs/$(basename ${f%.mp4}.png)"; done && echo "✓ Thumbs in raw/thumbs/"
